summary: Login/Logout Bug Fix (P0) VERIFIED. All 11 backend API tests passed. Frontend UI tests confirmed: admin logout properly clears session, subsequent student login correctly shows student dashboard with 'Krutika Class 6' profile (NOT admin data). The three root causes are fixed: 1) Backend delete_cookie now matches set_cookie attributes (samesite/secure/httponly), 2) Backend get_current_user prioritizes Authorization header over cookie, 3) Frontend clears localStorage before login.

issues: React hydration warning: span cannot be child of option/select - minor console warning, does not affect functionality

seed_data_creation: No new seed data created - used existing admin and student S3
context_for_next_testing_agent: Login/Logout bug fix verified. The P0 recurring bug where admin cookie persisted after logout is now fixed. Backend logout endpoint correctly deletes cookie with matching attributes. Backend auth prioritizes Authorization header over cookie. Frontend clears localStorage before new login. All flows tested: admin login, admin logout, student login after admin logout, student re-login.

backend_tests.TestAdminLogin::test_admin_login_success: PASSED - Admin login returns 200 and token
backend_tests.TestStudentLogin::test_student_login_suc: PASSED - Student S3 login returns correct role and name 'Krutika'
backend_tests.TestRoleSwitching::test_admin_logout_the: PASSED - CRITICAL: Student login after admin logout shows student data
backend_tests.TestRoleSwitching::test_student_logout_t: PASSED - Admin login after student logout shows admin data
backend_tests.TestAuthorizationHeaderPriority::test_be: PASSED - Authorization header takes priority over cookie

admin_login_flow.description: Admin login via Admin Login page works correctly

admin_logout_flow.description: Admin logout clears session and returns to login page

student_login_after_admin_logout.description: CRITICAL: Student S3 login shows 'Krutika Class 6' in profile dropdown, NOT admin data

profile_dropdown_verification.description: Profile dropdown shows correct student info with View Profile, Parent Dashboard, Logout options

bug_fix_verification.original_issue: After admin logs out, subsequent login attempts for teacher/student roles were buggy - login would fail or incorrectly authenticate as the previous admin
root_causes_fixed: Backend delete_cookie didn't match set_cookie attributes (samesite/secure/httponly) - cookie was never actually deleted
Server prioritized cookie over Authorization header - stale admin cookie overrode fresh student token
Frontend didn't clear stale cookies before new login
bug_fix_verification.verification_result: VERIFIED - All three fixes working. Admin logout properly clears session, student login shows correct student data.
